dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: We are not doing this right now.

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: We have to do this to beat the lazy reskin mod allegations.

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: Yeah listen to your girl buddy.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Guess I can't call myself Remnants if I can't beat the original remnant.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: At least I have my awesome Girlfriend here to support me.

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: Well my Boyfriend has me to support them too.

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: You're really not as special as you think you are.

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: Are you sure about that though?

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Yeah honestly both of the girls do look pretty similar.

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: I'm taking this as an insult.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Man I thought you guys would be more chill.

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: You're still not beating the lazy reskin mod allegations.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: I'll beat you in this battle and prove you wrong then.
